expectations.evidence: irreversible = True  # downgrade is blocked unless --force is passed
snapshot = True  # runic takes a GRAPH.COPY before upgrade; auto-restores on failure

expectations.text: downgrade() raises an error or clearly states irreversible / snapshot restore
expectations.evidence: raises NotImplementedError with explanation about snapshot restore

expectations.text: Property names are 'username' (old) and 'handle' (new), not reversed

expectations.evidence: Uses `runic upgrade --dry-run` — wrong flag; runic uses `--preview`, not `--dry-run`
